info.title: KVM Viewer REST API
info.description:
OpenAPI description of the three REST endpoints served by orch-cli
on localhost during an active KVM session.

SCOPE: This spec was derived from the existing implementation in
internal/cli/kvm_viewer.go and exists solely as input for
RESTler / FaaS fuzz testing (see test/fuzz/kvm/).
It is NOT used for Angular client code generation.
The Angular service (ui/kvm-viewer/src/app/services/kvm.service.ts)
is hand-written and requires no changes as a result of this spec.

post.description:
Called by the Angular app on load. Returns the current session state.
The MPS relay and AMT handshake are already in progress before the
browser opens, so no request body is needed.

get.description:
Returns the current state of the KVM session. Angular polls this
endpoint after /api/connect until state becomes "active".

post.description:
Called by the Angular app Disconnect button. Closes the AMT relay
and signals startKVMViewer to run the stop/cleanup path.

sessionToken.name: X-Session-Token
sessionToken.description:
256-bit crypto/rand token injected into index.html as
window.__ORCH_TOKEN. Angular reads it once and attaches it as the
X-Session-Token header on every API request. The fuzz server uses
a fixed well-known value defined in test/fuzz/kvm/token.sh.
